remarks: Looking for an opportunity to contribute my skills, grow professionally, and support the organization's success.
summary: HR professional with over 3.5 years of experience in recruitment, payroll management, compliance, and employee engagement.

responsibilities: Managed end-to-end recruitment, including technical hiring, through LinkedIn, Indeed, internal databases, and college hiring, including screening, interviews, and offer rollout.
Handled HR operations including HRMS, payroll processing, and statutory compliance (PF, ESIC, TDS).
Managed onboarding, exit formalities, and full & final settlements across the employee lifecycle.
Prepared HR documents such as Offer, appointment, confirmation, experience, and relieving letters.
Maintained HR documentation, attendance, and leave records while ensuring compliance.
Managed employee lifecycle processes including onboarding, exit formalities, and full & final settlements.
Represented the company at IITs, IIMs, and tech expos to attract potential talent.
Coordinated employee engagement activities and supported performance management processes.
Assisted in policy implementation and ensured adherence to company HR policies.
Conducted HR induction and Dojo training sessions for new employees.
Managed joining documentation and maintained overtime records.
Maintained and updated employee data in HR software.
Handled joining and exit formalities including onboarding and full & final settlement processes.
Conducted HR induction and Dojo training sessions for new joiners, including managing punching records and maintaining employee data in HRMS.
Prepared HR letters such as appointment, confirmation, and relieving letters.
Supported payroll processing activities including PF and ESIC compliance.
Organized and coordinated employee engagement activities.
Maintained employee records in Excel as well as hard and soft copies.
